description: Paints, chemicals, motor oil, fluorescent tubes, and medical waste.
preparation: Keep in original, clearly labeled containers
Do NOT place in ANY household bins (Trash or Recycling)
commonMistakes: Throwing medical sharps in the trash
facts: Improper disposal of hazardous waste can contaminate drinking water supplies.
Many municipalities have designated drop-off days for household hazardous waste.
Fluorescent bulbs contain trace amounts of mercury and must be handled carefully.
